response.global_summary: This video segment features a conversation and banter between members of the VTuber group 'holox' (La+ Darknesss, Takane Lui, Hakui Koyori, and Kazama Iroha). The members discuss their recent live performance, engage in humorous interaction regarding their song 'GyoukouX', introduce a DJ, make an important announcement regarding their live stream availability, and give closing remarks. There is no vocal musical performance in this video.

scenes.description: The holox members are on stage, waving, cheering, and giving an initial greeting to the audience.
The members chat amongst themselves about the stage and the medley performance that just took place.
The members transition to talking specifically about their special song, 'GyoukouX', with humorous banter and interactions.
The group introduces the DJ and discusses upcoming segment logistics, which leads into a lighthearted disagreement and setup for a formal announcement.
The members make an important announcement about the availability of their live stream on YouTube and TikTok, followed by reactions.
The group concludes the segment with closing remarks, promotion of future content, and a final call for feedback and screenshots.
